data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Stronger:
WALLY: I lost to you, {PLAYER}, but I'm
not feeling down anymore.\pBecause I have a new purpose in life.
Together with my RALTS, I'm going\lto challenge POKéMON GYMS and become\la great TRAINER.\pPlease watch me, {PLAYER}.
I'm going to be stronger than you.\pWhen I do, I'm going to challenge you
to another battle.
WALLY: Please watch me, {PLAYER}.\nI'm going to get stronger than you.\pWhen I do, I'm going to challenge you\nto another battle.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallysNe:
UNCLE: Oh! {PLAYER}{KUN}!
WALLY's next door.\pBut, boy, there's something I have to
tell you.\pThis natural environment is doing
wonders for WALLY's health.\pMaybe it's not just the environment.
It could be POKéMON that are giving the\lboy hope.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallySli: WALLY's gone away...\nHe slipped off on his own...
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallyGon: UNCLE: Is that right?\nWALLY's gone away that far all by\lhimself...\pWell, I have to give him credit - he is\nmy little brother's son.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_MeetWand:
WANDA: You are?
Oh, right, I get it!\pYou're the {PLAYER} who WALLY was
telling me about.\pI'm WALLY's cousin.
Glad to meet you!\pI think WALLY's become a lot more lively
and healthy since he came here.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_DontWorr: WANDA: Don't worry about WALLY.\nHe'll be just fine.\pI know my little cousin, and he has\nPOKéMON with him, too.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_CanSeeGi: Thanks to you, I can see my girlfriend\nevery day.\lHappy? You bet I am!
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Daughter:
My daughter's boyfriend is a very
driven and passionate sort of person.\pHe's been digging a tunnel nonstop
just so he can see my daughter.\pMy daughter's a little concerned,
so she goes out to the tunnel a lot.
It's amazing. My daughter's boyfriend\nwas digging the tunnel by hand!\pIt's so incredible!
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_IfAnythi: If anything were to happen to WALLY,\nI would never be able to look his\lparents in PETALBURG in the eye...
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallyWas: WALLY was in EVER GRANDE?\pHis parents in PETALBURG would be\nastonished to hear that!
